villas.name: Villa Orti
villas.description: A classic 19th century mansion nestled in historical gardens, just a short stroll from Dubrovnik's ancient Old City walls. Hidden from the public eye, it represents the ultimate intimate experience. Lovingly restored to combine high architectural standards of old masters with Scandinavian design functionality.
amenities: Historical Mediterranean gardens with citrus trees
villas.best_for: Luxury city experience, large groups, family reunions, celebrations

villas.name: Ghetaldi 1516
villas.description: One of the oldest Renaissance villas in the Dubrovnik region, originally constructed in 1516 as a summerhouse for the aristocratic Getaldić noble family. Gorgeously renovated with elements of gothic and renaissance architecture. Experience the delicate culture of living in harmony with the garden, fisherman's village, and medieval manors.
highlights: Built in 1516 — over 500 years of history
Terraced grounds with panoramic sea views
villas.best_for: Heritage lovers, secluded getaway, couples, history enthusiasts

villas.name: Villa Ella
villas.description: Located in the ancient and picturesque hamlet of Frajga, this authentic Dalmatian farmhouse has been luxuriously renovated. Drawing inspiration from sun, soil and sea, every room has a separate identity inspired by the rich variety of fruit in the villa's surroundings. An untouched piece of heaven — as close to a real-life garden of Eden as you can get.
highlights: Each room themed after local fruit varieties
villas.best_for: Immersive relaxation, intimate groups, nature lovers, couples

yacht.description: Explore the stunning Croatian coastline and Elaphiti archipelago on our private motor yacht. Day trips or overnight adventures available.

concierge_services: Restaurant reservations at top Dubrovnik venues
Game of Thrones filming locations tour

dubrovnik.description: The Pearl of the Adriatic — UNESCO World Heritage city with stunning medieval walls, baroque architecture and crystal-clear waters.
dubrovnik.climate: Mediterranean — 250+ sunny days per year, swimming season May-October

sipan.description: The Golden Island — largest of the Elaphiti archipelago. Unspoilt nature, rustic villages, and peaceful atmosphere just 45 minutes by ferry from Dubrovnik.
sipan.getting_there: Regular ferry from Dubrovnik port (45 min), or private boat transfer arranged by our team

policies.pets: Please inquire — evaluated on a case-by-case basis
policies.children: Welcome — cots and high chairs available
policies.cancellation: Please contact us for our cancellation policy
